title: Asimov Visionary Split-Scene Concept Art Prompt
description: A complex, multi-step prompt designed to generate a cinematic concept art image (16:9) that visually splits a scene diagonally, contrasting a visionary's historical workspace (e.g., Asimov) with the modern realization of their ideas, using contrasting lighting and elements.
content:
Do this for Asimov:   1. The Analysis:  
      Analyze Input:   Identify the Visionary's Era (e.g., 1950s) and their Core Predictions (e.g., Robotics, AI).
      Left Side (The Origin):   Construct the room based on the  actual  historical workspace of the person (e.g., Typewriters, cigarette smoke, blueprints, tungsten light).
      Right Side (The Legacy):   Construct the room based on the  modern realization  of their ideas (e.g., Clean server room, holograms, advanced prosthetics, cool LED light).

  2. Composition (The Rift):  
      The Divide:   A diagonal beam of light splits the room.
      The Subject:   The Visionary stands dead center.
         Left Half of Body:  Dressed in period clothing, holding a pen/paper.
         Right Half of Body:  Fading into digital pixels or observing a floating hologram of their invention.
      The Wall:  
         Left Wall:  Covered in pinned sketches and paper notes.
         Right Wall:  A floor-to-ceiling window looking out onto a futuristic city (The world they predicted).

  3. Visual 
      Cohesion:   The perspective lines of the room must match perfectly across the split. A wooden desk on the left might morph into a sleek glass interface on the right.
      Lighting:   Warm/Dusty (Left) vs. Cold/Sterile (Right).

  Output:   ONE image, 16:9 Aspect Ratio, Cinematic Concept Art, Photorealistic.

Center Panel — “Presence / Becoming”

Her outfit becomes more refined: a stylish flowing dress with subtle contemporary elegance.

Background includes skyline silhouettes, soft sunlight, and greenery, symbolizing growth, awareness, and stepping into life.
Right Panel — “Freedom / Expression”

The same woman is shown in motion on a dramatic coastal cliff with the ocean behind her.

She is captured mid-spin or mid-stride, hair and dress flowing strongly in the wind.

title: Ancient Jungle Temple Diorama Collectible Prompt
description: A detailed prompt for generating an image of an ancient jungle temple complex diorama. It specifies the scene layout (stepped temple, courtyards, moss, vines) and the required style: a premium stylized 3D collectible miniature, sculpted from smooth matte ceramic/resin, with controlled studio lightin
content:
SCENE:
A larger ancient jungle temple complex featuring a stepped main temple, several surrounding shrine structures, broken ceremonial courtyards, moss-covered staircases, carved statues, fragmented stone walls, and a shallow reflecting pool, all surrounded by dense tropical foliage and vines. Arrange the ruins so the space feels like a compact, layered miniature district with multiple clustered architectural elements, varied heights, and interconnected pathways, filling the platform naturally without empty gaps and reading clearly as a contained archaeological jungle ruin diorama.
STYLE:
Render as a premium stylized 3D collectible miniature diorama on a fully visible, centered self-contained display base, shown from a slightly elevated 3/4 tabletop angle against a clean neutral studio gradient background. Maintain collectible figurine scale and clean display presentation.
All elements should appear sculpted from smooth matte ceramic, painted resin, or stylized polymer with rounded edges, simplified geometry, and slightly exaggerated toy-like proportions. Keep surfaces clean and intentionally stylized. Avoid fingerprints, rough handmade textures, workshop scenes, macro photography depth-of-field, or photoreal clay imperfections.
Use soft professional studio product lighting: gentle global illumination, warm key light, soft ambient bounce, controlled shadows, and optional warm interior window glow.
Render any water or translucent materials as poured clear resin with smooth transparency, subtle reflections, soft internal depth, and slightly thick stylized edges.
Include small environmental details but keep everything cohesive, simplified, and sculptural. Prioritize clean stylized modeling over photorealistic texture detail.
Overall intent: premium collectible miniature, stylized 3D marketplace presentation, cozy whimsical mood, smooth sculpt clarity, controlled studio rendering, avoid real-world photography aesthetics.

class ChocolateCrepeAd:
    def __init__(self):
        self.resolution = "8K_ULTRA_HD"
        self.frame_ratio = "9:16"  # Optimized for Social Media
        https://t.co/cI7K2nrLBL = "Hyper-Realistic / Professional Styling"

    def setup_scene(self):
        # Background & Environment
        self.surface = cr.Surface(material="Rustic Wooden Board", texture="Grainy")
        self.background = Bokeh(source="Vibrant Green Plants", blur_intensity=0.8)
        https://t.co/ci6mMG4fGy = NaturalLight(time="Warm Golden Hour", mood="Soft Cinematic")

        # The Subject: Gourmet Crepes
        self.subject = cr.FoodItem(
            type="Ultra-Thin Golden Crepes",
            form="Tight Cylinders",
            quantity="Casual Stack",
            attributes={
                "edges": "Lightly Browned / Crispy",
                "topping": "Elegant Dark Chocolate Spiral Stripes",
                "filling": "Rich Glossy Chocolate-Hazelnut Spread"
            }
        )

    def apply_motion_effects(self):
        # Dynamic Elements
        FluidDynamics.add_drizzle(
            substance="Molten Chocolate",
            speed="Slow-Motion",
            behavior="Falling / Coating"
        )
        SteamParticles.emit(source=self.subject, opacity=0.3)
        
        # Camera Movement
        https://t.co/Oq1q7ViC4J = https://t.co/Wl1DQQj2RB(mode="Macro")
        https://t.co/Oq1q7ViC4J.path = ["Slow Pan", "Tilt", "Slight Rotation"]
        https://t.co/Oq1q7ViC4J.focus = "Gooey ends and creamy textures"

    def render_commercial(self):
        return self.setup_scene().apply_motion_effects().execute(fps=60)

content:
正面を向いた動画風のショットを作成。カメラは顔の高さで固定、被写体の真正面に配置。被写体は姿勢と構図から座っていることが示されている。

空間は個人的な空間として感じられる。ボケはカメラの限界によるもので、人工的な被写界深度効果ではない。全体的な雰囲気は温かく、明るく、親密で、被写体が話し始める直前のリアルなVlogの瞬間を思わせる。

女性のセリフは、「今日のファッションは【ファッションの特徴を追加】がポイントです！」と優しい口調で話しながら服を触っている。最後に笑顔になる。

title: Dual-Orientation Optical Illusion Portrait
description: A highly technical prompt for generating a dual-orientation optical illusion portrait in strict monochrome, where the image reveals a young woman's side profile when viewed upright, and an elderly woman's side profile when rotated 180 degrees, requiring precise contour reinterpretation and Moiré int
content:
Create a dual-orientation optical illusion portrait.
When viewed in normal upright position (0° orientation), the image must clearly reveal a young woman’s left-facing side profile.
When the image is rotated 180 degrees (phone flipped upside down), the same composition must reveal an elderly woman’s side profile.
Both identities must share the exact same contour structure and occupy identical spatial boundaries. No separate drawings, no split screen, no overlay. The transformation must occur purely through contour reinterpretation and structural ambiguity.
Design the contour so that:
The young woman’s chin becomes the elderly woman’s nose when rotated.
The young woman’s ear becomes the elderly woman’s eye socket.
The young woman’s neckline becomes the elderly woman’s mouth and chin structure.
Apply a Moiré interference surface using ultra-thin radial or dual-frequency line patterns across the entire composition. The interference pattern must enhance depth without breaking the dual-orientation illusion.
Strict monochrome palette. Black background (#000000) with white or light gray line structures only. No color. No gradients except those created by line density. No blur. No texture noise.
Ultra-precise vector alignment. High contrast. Clean silhouette edges. 8K ultra-high resolution. Aspect ratio 4:5.
The illusion must be readable in both orientations.
